originalTitle: Marvel’s Wolverine - Ain’t No Hero Trailer I PS5 Games
content: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marvels-wolverine/ Unleash the rage, confront the past. With the fate of humans and mutants hanging in the balance, Logan knows the world needs a hero; however, they’ll have to settle for Wolverine. Experience thrilling set pieces throughout Wolverine’s journey in this global fight for mutant survival. Marvel’s Wolverine arrives on PlayStation 5 consoles September 15, 2026. Pre-order now. © 2026 MARVEL ©2026 Sony Interactive Entertainment Inc. Developed by Insomniac Games, Inc. #ps5 #ps5games #wolverine #marvelswolverine
chineseContent: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marvels-wolverine/ 释放愤怒，面对过去。随着人类和变种人的命运悬而未决，洛根知道世界需要英雄；然而，他们将不得不接受金刚狼。在这场全球变种人生存之战中，体验金刚狼旅程中惊心动魄的场景。 Marvel 的金刚狼将于 2026 年 9 月 15 日登陆 PlayStation 5 主机。立即预订。 © 2026 MARVEL ©2026 Sony Interactive Entertainment Inc. 由 Insomniac Games, Inc. 开发 #ps5 #ps5games #wolverine #marvelswolverine
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
